title: Wave1 Port Account Library Leftovers — MYPAGE, SETTINGS, LEFTOVERS, ATE_LIST, RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL
summary: MYPAGE, SETTINGS, LEFTOVERS, ATE_LIST, and RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL의 Wave1 프로토타입 개선사항을 기존 공식 API 계약 범위 안에서 UI-only로 포팅한다. 계정/레시피북/장보기 기록의 시각 위계, 설정 계정 액션, 남은요리/다먹은요리 버튼 clipping, RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL custom book menu를 정리한다.
goal: MYPAGE top gear/saved section/account action 정리, SETTINGS logout/delete/account category polish, LEFTOVERS/ATE_LIST button/copy/meta polish, RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL custom book kebab menu를 기존 16/17a/17b/17c/planner-column-customization 계약 범위 안에서 포팅한다.
notes: Closeout projection for Stage 4~6 frontend PR. Stage 1 docs PR #382 merged after Claude handoff attempted through resume session 3f4ca745-db71-4392-a3f1-4e3c4493e9bc with model=opus, permission_mode=bypassPermissions, requested effort=xhigh recorded, CLI effort=high; provider limit reset 13:20 Asia/Seoul blocked Claude editing, so Codex completed fallback per user instruction. Stage 2/3 N/A (UI-only). Stage 4/5 Codex fallback completed MYPAGE visible settings entry, LEFTOVERS/ATE_LIST button clipping and copy polish, ATE_LIST uneat API preservation with 남은요리로 복귀 label, RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL custom book menu using existing PATCH/DELETE endpoints, 390/320 screenshot evidence, WAVE1_ACCOUNT_LIBRARY_LEFTOVERS authority report with blocker 0, exploratory QA eval score 98, targeted Vitest/Playwright, and pnpm verify:frontend. Manual Only real-device/real-seed smokes remain deferred by acceptance. Final current-head GitHub checks remain the merge gate. closeout_phase=completed closeout_recovery=manual_patch:1|ci_resync:0 closeout_repair=codex:2|claude:1|manual_decision:0|human_escalation:0|post_merge_stale:0|sources:pnpm verify:frontend,Vitest,Playwright,QA eval,ui/designs/authority/WAVE1_ACCOUNT_LIBRARY_LEFTOVERS-authority.md last_recovery_at=2026-05-10T05:03:14.264Z
out_of_scope: leftover_dishes 응답에 끼니명/인분/meal column 정보를 임의 추가
덜먹음 API 삭제 또는 상태 전이 제거
회원 탈퇴, 로그아웃, 닉네임 변경, planner column management 정책 변경
open_questions: LEFTOVERS meta에서 끼니명/인분이 꼭 필요해지면 contract-evolution으로 분리한다.
ATE_LIST의 덜먹음 action은 API를 유지한 채 숨김/보조화/문구 변경 중 Stage 4에서 결정하고 근거를 남긴다.
RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL 전체 재디자인은 drift proof가 있을 때만 진행한다.
